title: Hive Lord destroys one magic card on summon

card.rawText: When summoned, destroy 1 magic card on the field.

plan.title: Hive Lord destroys one magic card on summon
plan.summary: Summon Hive Lord while a magic card is on the field, choose that field magic, and verify it is destroyed.

notes: Hive Lord's rules text requires a magic card on the field at summon time.
Player_2 has Ball and Chain equipped/in a magic slot as Hive Lord's target.

steps: Select player_2 Ball and Chain as the magic card to destroy.

expectedAssertions.label: Hive Lord is summoned as primary creature
Former equip cleanup removes attached magic

manualVerification: Confirm the summon-triggered prompt lets the player choose exactly one magic card on the field.
riskNotes: This mirrors the already-working destroy-one-magic path, but verifies it from a creature's ON_SUMMON trigger.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Hive Lord's summon-triggered destroy-one-magic effect.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
